The '''Fferon system''' was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] that contained the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Rutal IV]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: When the Fat Lady Swings]]''
